title: Crispy Bhuna Redcurrant Stir-fry
description: A savory and crunchy Spanish dish featuring redcurrants that can help cure hangovers, served as a breakfast option.

ingredients.name: 1 cup fresh redcurrants
ingredients.notes: Use only the juice from the redcurrants

instructions: In a small saucepan, simmer the redcurrant juice over medium heat until reduced by half. Remove from heat and set aside.
Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Add garlic and onion; sauté for about 1 minute or until fragrant.
Add bell pepper to the pan with garlic and onion, stirring occasionally for about 5 minutes until softened.
Gently fold redcurrant juice into the vegetable mixture. Reduce heat to low and simmer for another 2-3 minutes allowing flavors to meld together.
If using shredded cheese, sprinkle it over the top of the stir-fry just before serving. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot as a side dish or on a wrap as a light breakfast option.
